name: Dill Pickle Soup
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Dill pickles, shredded or finely chopped (about 1 1/2 cups)
1 cup White wine or additional chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle, melt the butter.
2. Add flour; cook and stir until bubbly.
3. Gradually add the broth.
4. Add the next 12 ingredients.
5. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
6. Reduce heat.
7. Add milk.
8. Remove bay leaves.
9. Add food coloring and garnish if desired.
